entries.title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
entries.description: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

entries.title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
entries.description: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

entries.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
entries.description: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express,  Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.

entries.title: Gitar, a startup that uses agents to secure code, emerges from stealth with $9 million
entries.description: The company uses AI to review code that, more often than not these days, has also been generated by AI.

entries.title: This startup is betting tokenmaxxing will create the next compute giant
entries.description: Parasail raised $32 million in a Series A, signaling a fractured future of models and compute.

entries.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos

entries.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
entries.description: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.

entries.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
entries.description:
The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.

There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

entries.title: Google brings its Gemini Personal Intelligence feature to India
entries.description: The feature lets users connect Google accounts like Gmail and Photos to get personalized answers.

entries.description: Anything is planning to launch a desktop companion app to aid mobile app development after its App Store removal.

entries.description: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

entries.description: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

entries.description: These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.

entries.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.
